children.heading: .—Motorboat Fuel Taxes
children.label: a .—Motorboat Fuel Taxes
children.text: There shall be set aside in the Fund the amounts specified in section 9503(c)(3)(B) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ().26 U.S.C. 9503(c)(3)(B)

the amounts paid before , under section 6421 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 () with respect to gasoline used after , in motorboats, on the basis of claims filed for periods ending before ; andOctober 1, 2029December 31, 1964October 1, 202826 U.S.C. 6421

80 percent of the floor stocks refunds made before , under section 6412(a)(1) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 () with respect to gasoline to be used in motorboats.October 1, 202926 U.S.C. 6412(a)(1)
